Sage Bot Item Code: W22
Medusa's Gift Wand

Once in a while, the unit fires a magic orb at the target. The orb deals 128000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage and turns the targets to stone for 3 sec. During this time, the target of the ability can't move and takes 35% more damage. When petrification wears off, the target of the ability has their damage reduced by 45% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
